---
title: "Midterm Assessment"
author: "Zach Barrett"
date: last-modified
---

---


::: {.callout-warning}
# Work in progress!
:::


The midterm test is a closed book assessment. Because of that and the fact that
I like my job, I cannot give you much information about it.

That being said, what I *can* tell you, is that it has two parts. The first
is a multi choice questionaire, and the second is a timed PCB design
assessment. You will get ~3.5 hours to route a PCB.

I would recommend that you learn how to route a PCB *quickly*, and with minimal
outside information. You will also need to make the *outline* of the PCB, so I
recommend learning how to do that.

Good luck, this one is hard.
